prompt:
Goal: editorial illustration for a programming textbook
Scene: A glowing golden orb in the center labeled "Pending" with a swirling animation effect suggesting it is processing. Two paths diverge from it. The upper path (green, curving upward) leads to a smiling resolved state: the orb has turned green and cracked open to reveal a gift box labeled "value" inside. The lower path (red, curving downward) leads to a frowning rejected state: the orb has turned red and cracked to show a warning symbol labeled "error". A timeline arrow at the bottom shows "created → pending → settled". Small clock icons suggest the passage of time.
Style: Head First book illustration style, clean lines, slightly whimsical and humorous, warm colors, educational
Aspect ratio: 16:9
Background: white
Text in image: minimal or none
Avoid: photorealistic, dark, scary, complex UI screenshots
